sevenDay.synopsis: It's another colorful week! LIFR should improve by 09L or so, but IFR will set in by 22L tonight. There's also a slight chance of showers during the N1. For tomorrow and Wednesday, expect that same trend of AM/N1 IFR, but we should remain dry. On Thursday, we'll start out LIFR, but we'll also deal with showers and ISOLD TS as a cold front sweeps thru during the AM hours. Winds could gust up to 25kts around the front but should abate for the N1. The front will finally clear out all this IFR, and we'll have a few good days!
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 09 MAR - 15 MAR
